task.goal: recover or rediscover a live input-correlated Rift feature quickly using the focused-PostMessage workflow
definition_of_done: Identify a current-process feature source that reacts under a controlled focused-PostMessage stimulus and survives current-client validation.
Use paired opposite-direction preflight stimuli when the feature is rotational so a candidate must show opposite-sign responses, bounded idle drift, and bounded coordinate drift before full recovery.
Pin the best candidate early and prove it with a full recovery pass instead of continuing broad noisy screening once a credible winner appears.
Capture machine-readable evidence, commands, thresholds, artifact paths, blocker classification, and any operator action needed.
adaptation_rules: Reuse the same workflow shape for future features even when the feature is not actor yaw: verify surviving baselines, isolate aggressive artifacts, focus Rift, use PostMessage, broad screen, pin the best candidate, then escalate to triage only if no winner exists.
Replace only the feature-specific measurement commands, threshold names, and artifact filenames; keep the focus-first and evidence-first workflow intact.
If the feature does not depend on rotational movement, replace the opposite-direction preflight requirement with the smallest feature-specific dual-stimulus gate that can reject noise.
forbidden_actions: Do not treat old owner-source lineage artifacts as current truth without current-process validation.
Do not silently fall back to SendInput when focused PostMessage is required.
Do not treat hidden-desktop screenshot heuristics as authoritative when that desktop is not visible.
Do not continue broad candidate spraying after a validated winner is already proven.
Do not let ReaderBridge refresh failure abort the whole unattended workflow when the no-refresh path is still viable.

context.desktop_topology: Rift may run on another isolated or non-visible desktop while Codex remains elsewhere

current_branch_truth.trusted_live_input_lane: focused PostMessage with Rift foreground verified or re-established before each live input send
current_branch_truth.screen_gate_truth: Hidden-desktop screenshot UI checks are non-authoritative unless the Rift desktop is visible
current_branch_truth.reader_refresh_behavior: unattended wrappers should retry without forced ReaderBridge refresh if refresh is the only failing layer

notes: The real candidate was found early but initially failed only because repeated warning delays created false idle drift.
Focused PostMessage plus suppressed script-side warning delays produced the validated win.

authoritative_inputs.role: living truth for what is valid right now
dated proof that the workflow succeeded on actor yaw and why it succeeded

expected: matches ReaderBridge player identity and current values closely enough for live work
coordinate offsets remain usable for drift checks

phases.name: verify_baselines
phases.goal: confirm the reader baseline still supports live before-and-after comparisons

phases.name: focus_and_input_policy
phases.goal: use only focused PostMessage for live gameplay stimuli
rules: Verify Rift foreground belongs to the target process
Re-verify or re-establish Rift foreground before each live input send
If focus verification fails, stop for operator intervention

phases.name: broad_screen
phases.goal: screen a bounded candidate set aggressively with separate artifacts

phases.name: pin_best_candidate
phases.goal: run a full pinned recovery immediately after a candidate shows strong preflight behavior
rules: Prefer the first candidate that survives paired opposite-direction preflight with bounded drift
Stop immediately when full recovery proves the feature
Record the exact winning source, basis offset, keys, and output artifact

phases.name: triage_if_no_winner
phases.goal: narrow the next search space only after aggressive screening fails

phases.name: promote_truth
phases.goal: promote the winner into living truth and dated proof once validated
required_outputs: preserve or update the machine-readable workflow packet if the live method changed materially

winner_expectations: opposite-direction paired responses for rotational features
stable source identity across the relevant captures

if_workflow_changes: update current truth if branch defaults changed
